The Grand Offer
Part 2: The Price
We begin by introducing what’s called a
Faux Price… 	This is a price that’s roughly twice
that of your actual price
This is done to anchor a higher price in your
prospects mind before adding in all your
bonuses, so your actual price will be that much
more appealing of an offer
Example Slide:

-- 70 of 230 --

The Price Of The Every Other Day
Diet System Sold 	By Itself 	Is
Valued At $97…

The Grand Offer
Part 2: The Price
Now that your prospect has been set up to receive a beQer
deal, you must give him/her a valid reason for
the reduc6on in price
The best reason possible is the establishment of a cause, as
most people want to be a part of something
larger than themselves
Note: A cause is not an absolute necessity. Some services and
products cannot pull this off. If that is your case, then simply
state that you are offering an “online-­‐only special”. However,
if you can create a cause, it’s more powerful

At this point, you can choose to include an 	your
buy buHon reveal. This is a very good place to
allow the purchase to take place
This takes place via our Magic Buy BuHon

is revealed under the video at a predetermined
6me, set by you. You can also put graphics,
tes6monials, and even full sales page copy
under the video at this point (recommended)

-- 116 of 230 --

The Grand Offer
Part 2: The Price
Now you must create a guarantee. Solid guarantees can increase
conversions by 50% or more. The most effec6ve guarantee I’ve ever
used, aside from offering “double your money back”, is what
I call The 3X Triple Guarantee
The benefit to the Triple Guarantee is that you do not risk paying back
anything other than the cost of the product, unlike the “double your
money back” guarantee (although consider this if your refund rates
are really low)
It’s a good idea to con6nue to show your graphics at this point, and
include any site security, guarantee seal, or other authorita6ve
graphics at this point as well (if you have them)
